title: Comparing an Inch to a Centimeter

steps.work: An inch is about 2.5 times longer than a centimeter.
steps.explanation: This is the key conversion between the two systems.

steps.instruction: About how many cm is 4 inches?
steps.explanation: Multiply inches by 2.54 to get centimeters.

steps.work: Metric (used by most countries) uses base 10. Customary (used in the US) uses varied conversions.
steps.explanation: Metric: 10 mm = 1 cm, 100 cm = 1 m. Customary: 12 in = 1 ft, 3 ft = 1 yd.

steps.work: 1 kg ≈ 2.2 lb. 1 L ≈ 1 qt. 1 km ≈ 0.6 mi.

steps.instruction: A road sign says 50 km. About how many miles?
Does 30 miles for 50 km seem right?
steps.work: A marathon is about 42 km ≈ 26 miles. So 50 km ≈ 31 miles. Close!
steps.explanation: Using known references helps verify estimates.
